properties.title: Luxury 4-Bedroom Duplex
properties.description: Stunning luxury duplex in the heart of Lekki Phase 1. Features include private swimming pool, smart home system, fully equipped kitchen, and 24/7 security.

properties.title: Prime Commercial Land
properties.description: Prime commercial land located in the fast-developing Thomas Estate. Perfect for retail or office development. Close to major roads and amenities.

properties.title: Modern 3-Bedroom Flat
properties.description: Beautiful 3-bedroom flat in a secure estate in Ikoyi. Features modern finishes, central AC, and 24/7 power.
